mapper.update: UPDATE sample set name = ifnull(#{name}, name) , description = ifnull(#{description}, description) , use_yn = ifnull(#{useYn}, use_yn) , file_name = ifnull(#{fileName}, file_name) where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id , name , description , file_name , use_yn , reg_user from sample where id = #{id} and use_yn = 'Y'
select id, name, description, use_yn, reg_user, prod_num from sample where 1=1 and use_yn = 'Y' -- limit 5000
select lpad(ifnull(max(prod_num), 0) + 1, 6, '0') as prod_num_max from sample where 1 = 1 and use_yn = 'Y';
mapper.update: update sample z join ( -- 전체 최고값 + 1을 구하고 6자리로 패딩 select lpad(ifnull(max(prod_num), 0) + 1, 6, '0') as max_prod_num, id from sample where use_yn = 'Y' group by prod_num, id ) x on z.id = x.id set z.prod_num = x.max_prod_num where z.use_yn = 'Y';
mapper.select: select rpad('_header_', 20, ' ') as header , rpad(id, 20, ' ') as id , rpad(name, 45, ' ') as name , rpad(description, 50, ' ') as description , rpad(use_yn, 5, ' ') as use_yn , rpad(reg_user, 50, ' ') as reg_user from sample where 1=1 limit 10

select id, name, description, file_name, use_yn, reg_user from sample where 1=1
and id like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
and name like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
and use_yn = 'Y' order by id desc limit #{firstIndex}, #{recordCountPerPage}

select count(*) totcnt from sample where 1=1 and use_yn = 'Y'
and id like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
and name like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
